description: A screenshot of a social-media post from an account labeled 'Mark Hamill' with the handle '@markhamillofficial.bsky.social'. The post text expresses a wish that a political figure live to face electoral and legal consequences, ending with a hashtag. Below is an attached image showing an older man in a dark suit and red tie lying in soil in front of a headstone reading 'DONALD J. TRUMP 1946 to 2024', surrounded by daisies, with the words 'If Only' across the bottom. The post is timestamped 2:52 PM, May 6, 2026.
notable_text: Mark Hamill; If Only; DONALD J. TRUMP 1946 2024
